positive: A minimalistic, stylized geometric depiction of a celestial body, like a crescent moon or distant nebula, floating among sharp, abstract constellations and crystalline asteroid fragments. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep navy, cosmic indigo, metallic silver, and faint gold. The composition must feature clean, bold silhouettes with sharp edges, designed to look excellent on wearable fabric. Style should be modern cosmic art, incorporating sacred geometry patterns. The overall mood is mystical, ethereal, and clean. Full bleed, high detail, vector art aesthetic, centered composition.
